title: Implement Distributed Tracing for Streams
description: Propagate OpenTelemetry trace contexts across long-lived gRPC and WebSocket streams. Implement distributed tracing to profile message-level latency in real-time systems.
objectives: Propagate OpenTelemetry trace contexts across long-lived gRPC and WebSocket streams.
Implement distributed tracing to profile message-level latency in real-time systems.
